sentences.arabic: أَرَادَتْ لَيْلَى أَنْ تَرَى غُرُوبَ الشَّمْسِ عَلَى الْبَحْرِ.
sentences.translation: Lejla je željela gledati zalazak sunca nad morem.
sentences.translationEn: Layla wanted to see the sunset over the sea.

sentences.arabic: ذَهَبَتْ إِلَى الشَّاطِئِ قَبْلَ الْمَغْرِبِ بِوَقْتٍ قَصِيرٍ.
sentences.translation: Otišla je na plažu kratko prije zalaska.
sentences.translationEn: She went to the beach a short while before sunset.

sentences.arabic: جَلَسَتْ عَلَى الرَّمْلِ وَنَظَرَتْ إِلَى الْأُفُقِ.
sentences.translation: Sjela je na pijesak i gledala u horizont.
sentences.translationEn: She sat on the sand and looked at the horizon.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ غُرُوبُ الشَّمْسِ أَجْمَلَ مَا رَأَتْهُ فِي حَيَاتِهَا.
sentences.translation: Zalazak sunca je bio najljepše što je vidjela u životu.
sentences.translationEn: The sunset was the most beautiful thing she had ever seen.
